text:
[...]
===>   Registering installation for llvm17-17.0.1
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/devel/llvm17/work-default/stage/usr/local/llvm17/lib/clang/17/include/arm_sme_draft_spec_subject_to_change.h:No such file or directory
*** Error code 1

Possibly relevant is that the port is configured with BE_NATIVE.
